courseTitle: Applied Game Mathematics, Technical Art, and Production Pipelines
title: Screen-Space Outline or Highlight Shader Game
genericDescription: Use materials, render passes, depth, normals, masks, or engine-equivalent techniques to communicate affordances; separate visual effect from game logic.
specificDescription: Build a game where interactable, dangerous, hidden, or selected objects are communicated through a custom outline, highlight, x-ray, silhouette, or screen-space effect. Include at least three gameplay states with distinct visual treatment.
gradingRubric: 30 pts shader/material implementation; 20 pts gameplay readability; 20 pts visual polish; 15 pts performance and artifact control; 15 pts technical breakdown.
